_note: MCP server config for attaching claude-ide-bridge to an Anthropic Managed Agent. Paste into platform.claude.com → Settings → MCP Servers. Replace YOUR_BRIDGE_URL and YOUR_TOKEN before use.
_docs: Full setup guide: documents/managed-agents.md. VPS setup: deploy/README.md + docs/remote-access.md.
name: claude-ide-bridge
description: Live workspace tools: git, file search, diagnostics, tests, LSP (when VS Code extension connected).

transport._note: Streamable HTTP transport. Bridge exposes MCP at POST /mcp with Bearer token auth.

_setup.step1: Start bridge on VPS: claude-ide-bridge --bind 0.0.0.0 --full --fixed-token YOUR_TOKEN --watch --workspace /path/to/project
_setup.step2: Place nginx with TLS in front (see deploy/nginx-claude-bridge.conf.template). Managed Agents requires HTTPS.
_setup.step3: Replace YOUR_BRIDGE_URL with your domain (e.g. bridge.example.com) and YOUR_TOKEN with the fixed token.
_setup.token_tip: Use --fixed-token to prevent token rotation between agent invocations. Store token in a secrets manager.

_headless_tools.note: These tools work without VS Code extension connected.

_extension_required_tools.note: These tools return isError:true when VS Code extension is not connected. They work when code-server runs on the VPS with the bridge extension installed.
